mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders_tb (user_id, status, total_price, address, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{address}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO order_item_tb (orders_id, product_id, size_id, color_id, price, quantity) VALUES
(#{item.ordersId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.sizeId}, #{item.colorId}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity})
